command:
python3 -c "
import re, sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/runtime')

# Read actual file
soul_text = open('/tmp/moreno-ai-setup/agents/sakura/SOUL.md', encoding='utf-8').read()

# Show first 200 chars as repr to catch encoding issues
print("=== RAW BYTES REPR ===")
print(repr(soul_text[:200]))

print()
print("=== SECTION SEARCH ===")
for name in ["Identity", "Immutable Traits", "Mutable Traits (initial state)"]:
    pat = rf'^#{1,3}\s+{re.escape(name)}\s*$'
    m = re.search(pat, soul_text, re.I | re.M)
    print(f"  '{name}': {'FOUND at ' + str(m.start()) if m else 'NOT FOUND'}")
    if m:
        start = m.end()
        nxt = re.search(r'^#{1,3}\s+', soul_text[start:], re.M)
        end = start + nxt.start() if nxt else len(soul_text)
        section = soul_text[start:end].strip()
        print(f"    content: {repr(section[:80])}")

print()
print("=== LINE ENDINGS ===")
cr = soul_text.count('\r')
lf = soul_text.count('\n')
print(f"  \\r count: {cr}, \\n count: {lf}")
if cr > 0:
    print("  WARNING: Windows line endings detected (\\r\\n)")

print()
print("=== HEADINGS FOUND ===")
for m in re.finditer(r'^#{1,3}\s+.+$', soul_text, re.M):
    print(f"  {repr(m.group())}")
"
